sentences.target: Ich muss heute mein Fahrrad reparieren.

translations.de: Ich muss heute mein Fahrrad reparieren.
translations.en: I have to fix my bike today.
translations.es: Hoy tengo que arreglar mi bicicleta.
translations.fr: Je dois réparer mon vélo aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi devo riparare la mia bici.
translations.pt: Hoje tenho que consertar minha bicicleta.
translations.he: אני צריך לתקן את האופניים היום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải sửa xe đạp.
translations.nl: Ik moet vandaag mijn fiets repareren.
translations.hu: Ma meg kell javítanom a biciklimet.
translations.hi: मुझे आज अपनी साइकिल ठीक करनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να φτιάξω το ποδήλατό μου σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg må reparere sykkelen min i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini saya harus memperbaiki sepeda saya.
translations.sv: Jag måste laga min cykel idag.
translations.da: Jeg skal reparere min cykel i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は自転車を直さないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary expressing necessity (present, 1st sg), selecting the bare infinitive 'reparieren'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.
Possessive determiner (1st person sg) modifying the noun 'Fahrrad'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'reparieren'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive, complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Mein Vater kann die Lampe reparieren.

translations.de: Mein Vater kann die Lampe reparieren.
translations.en: My father can fix the lamp.
translations.es: Mi padre puede arreglar la lámpara.
translations.fr: Mon père peut réparer la lampe.
translations.it: Mio padre può riparare la lampada.
translations.pt: Meu pai pode consertar a lâmpada.
translations.he: אבא שלי יכול לתקן את המנורה.
translations.vi: Bố tôi có thể sửa cái đèn.
translations.nl: Mijn vader kan de lamp repareren.
translations.hu: Apukám meg tudja javítani a lámpát.
translations.hi: मेरे पापा लैंप ठीक कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου μπορεί να φτιάξει τη λάμπα.
translations.ja: 父はランプを直せます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Vater'.
Common noun; subject (nominative) of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) expressing ability; selects bare infinitive 'reparieren'.
Definite article marking 'Lampe' as definite (accusative object here).
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'reparieren'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive, complement of the modal 'kann'.

sentences.target: Im Laden kann die Frau das Handy reparieren.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈlaːdən kan diː fʁaʊ das ˈhɛndi ʁepaˈʁiːʁən/

translations.de: Im Laden kann die Frau das Handy reparieren.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈlaːdən kan diː fʁaʊ das ˈhɛndi ʁepaˈʁiːʁən/
translations.en: In the shop, the woman can fix the phone.
translations.es: En la tienda, la mujer puede arreglar el teléfono.
translations.fr: Au magasin, la femme peut réparer le téléphone.
translations.it: In negozio, la donna può riparare il telefono.
translations.ko: 가게에서 그 여자는 휴대폰을 고칠 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在店里，那位女士可以修手机。
translations.yue: 喺舖頭嗰位女士可以整手機。
translations.ru: В магазине женщина может починить телефон.
translations.pt: Na loja, a mulher pode consertar o telefone.
translations.he: בחנות, האישה יכולה לתקן את הטלפון.
translations.vi: Ở cửa hàng, người phụ nữ có thể sửa điện thoại.
translations.ar: في المتجر، تستطيع المرأة إصلاح الهاتف.
translations.nl: In de winkel kan de vrouw de telefoon repareren.
translations.uk: У магазині жінка може полагодити телефон.
translations.hu: Az üzletben a nő meg tudja javítani a telefont.
translations.hi: दुकान में वह महिला फोन ठीक कर सकती है.
translations.pl: W sklepie kobieta może naprawić telefon.
translations.el: Στο μαγαζί, η γυναίκα μπορεί να φτιάξει το τηλέφωνο.
translations.nb: I butikken kan kvinnen reparere telefonen.
translations.id: Di toko, perempuan itu bisa memperbaiki telepon.
translations.sv: I butiken kan kvinnan laga telefonen.
translations.ro: În magazin, femeia poate repara telefonul.
translations.cs: V obchodě může žena opravit telefon.
translations.da: I butikken kan kvinden reparere telefonen.
translations.ja: 店でその女性は携帯電話を直せます。

tokens.explanation: Prepositional contraction of 'in dem'; introduces a locative PP and licenses dative case on 'Laden'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'Im' (dative).
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) in verb-second position; selects bare infinitive 'reparieren'.
Definite article marking 'Frau' as definite (nominative subject here).
Common noun; subject (nominative) of the clause.
Definite article marking 'Handy' as definite (accusative object).
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'reparieren'.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive, complement of the modal 'kann'.

sentences.target: Wir wollen den Tisch zusammen reparieren.

translations.de: Wir wollen den Tisch zusammen reparieren.
translations.en: We want to fix the table together.
translations.fr: Nous voulons réparer la table ensemble.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לתקן את השולחן יחד.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn sửa cái bàn cùng nhau.
translations.nl: We willen de tafel samen repareren.
translations.hi: हम मेज को साथ में ठीक करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να φτιάξουμε το τραπέζι μαζί.
translations.ja: 私たちは一緒にテーブルを直したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st pl) expressing intention; selects bare infinitive 'reparieren'.
Definite article, masculine accusative, marking 'Tisch' as the direct object.
Common noun; direct object (accusative) of 'reparieren'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating joint action.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive, complement of the modal 'wollen'.

jp: Ich muss heute mein Fahrrad reparieren.
Mein Vater kann die Lampe reparieren.
Im Laden kann die Frau das Handy reparieren.
Wir wollen den Tisch zusammen reparieren.
fu: /ɪm ˈlaːdən kan diː fʁaʊ das ˈhɛndi ʁepaˈʁiːʁən/
de: Ich muss heute mein Fahrrad reparieren.

Im Laden kann die Frau das Handy reparieren.
Wir wollen den Tisch zusammen reparieren.
ipa: /ɪm ˈlaːdən kan diː fʁaʊ das ˈhɛndi ʁepaˈʁiːʁən/
en: I have to fix my bike today.
My father can fix the lamp.
In the shop, the woman can fix the phone.
We want to fix the table together.
